use_codes.desc: ENHANCEMENT OF THE BIOAVAILABILITY OF THE DRUG SUBSTANCE
USE OF METAXALONE FOR TREATMENT OF MUSCULOSKELETAL CONDITIONS

indications.text:
SKELAXIN (metaxalone) is indicated as an adjunct to rest, physical therapy, and other measures for
the relief of discomforts associated with acute, painful musculoskeletal conditions. The mode of action
of this drug has not been clearly identified, but may be related to its sedative properties. Meta...

SKELAXIN (metaxalone) is indicated as an adjunct to rest, physical therapy, and other measures
for the relief of discomforts associated with acute, painful musculoskeletal conditions. The mode
of action of this drug has not been clearly identified, but may be related to its sedative properties.
Meta...

SKELAXIN is indicated as an adjunct to rest, physical therapy, and other measures for the relief of discomfort
associated with acute, painful musculoskeletal conditions in adults and pediatric patients 13 years of age and
older.
